title: berkheya onopordifolia
intro: Berkheya onopordifolia, also known as the yellow daisy or African daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Berkheya onopordifolia has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, Berkheya onopordifolia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
